channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya hosts 2026 Mashariki Cooperation Conference to strengthen African intelligence and security cooperation
item.description: For the 2026 Mashariki Cooperation Conference (MCC) wey hold for Diani, Kwale County, Kenya don confirm itself as Africa top voice for intelligence and security. The third edition of the conference, o...

item.title: Meghan Markle attends Netflix event in Montecito alongside Ted Sarandos' wife and other celebrities
item.description: Over the weekend, Meghan Markle, Duchess of Sussex, attended a high-profile Netflix event in Montecito, California. At the 'Beef Season Two Tastemaker' party, she was seen holding hands with Nicole Av...

item.title: Roysambu Graduation Interrupted by Alleged Goons, Chief Guest Munene Thuku Responds
item.description: A graduation ceremony at Viktel Training College in Roysambu was briefly disrupted by a group of alleged goons, creating tension during the otherwise celebratory event. The ceremony, presided over by ...

item.title: US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan end without agreement amid ongoing Middle East conflict
item.description: After a grueling 21-hour negotiation in Islamabad, the US and Iranian delegations concluded peace talks without reaching a deal, marking a setback in efforts to resolve the Middle East conflict. The U...

item.title: PDP Turaki Faction Accuses Police Of Aiding Unlawful Takeover Of National Secretariat Amid Leadership Crisis
item.description: The Taminu Turaki-led National Working Committee of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) has raised serious alarm over what they call an unlawful takeover of the party's national secretariat in Abuja. A...

item.title: US-Iran Peace Talks in Pakistan End Without Agreement After 21 Hours
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance led high-level negotiations with Iranian officials in Islamabad, Pakistan, aiming to secure a peace deal following recent conflicts. The talks, which included Trump's specia...

item.title: Sapphire Coast Race Day Preview and Tips for Monday
item.description: The Sapphire Coast racing meeting on Monday features a competitive line-up across seven races, with several promising contenders from Canberra and local provincial stables. In Race 1, Hunter One, a pr...

item.title: Nyeri Woman Overcomes Loss of Father and Brother to Qualify as Licensed Practical Nurse in Tennessee
item.description: Edith Wachira, a determined lady from the misty slopes of Tumutumu Hills in Nyeri County, has shown serious resilience after facing heavy grief. She lost her father and brother just two months apart w...

item.title: Passengers removed from Vancouver flight after disruptive behaviour
item.description: On April 11, 2026, at Vancouver International Airport (YVR), several passengers were removed from a Mexico-bound flight due to unruly and disruptive behaviour. Airport authorities, in coordination wit...

item.title: Original Balamory Cast Returns for New Series on CBeebies
item.description: More than two decades after the original series ended, the beloved children's programme Balamory is returning to CBeebies with a brand-new series. Julie Wilson Nimmo reprises her role as Miss Hoolie, ...

item.title: Trump downplays significance of ongoing Iran-US negotiations
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump stated that it made 'no difference' to him whether a peace deal is achieved between Iran and the United States, as high-level talks continue in Pakistan. Speaking to r...

item.title: UK government welcomes potential Chinese car investment amid rising imports
item.description: The UK government is adopting a relaxed stance towards the sharp rise in Chinese car imports, according to Business Secretary Peter Kyle. Chinese-owned brands now account for around 15 percent of new ...

item.title: Sargodha Marriage Halls Penalised for Violating One-Dish Regulation
item.description: In Sargodha, several marriage halls have faced penalties for not following the government's one-dish policy during wedding events. The assistant commissioner conducted surprise inspections and discove...

item.title: Udhayanidhi Stalin kicks off election campaign in Mannargudi supporting DMK candidate
item.description: On Sunday, Tamil Nadu Deputy Chief Minister Udhayanidhi Stalin launched his election campaign in the Mannargudi Assembly constituency, part of Thiruvarur district, supporting the DMK candidate TRB Raj...

item.title: Leon Malala Announces Bid for Lurambi MP Seat Amid Leadership Concerns
item.description: Leon Major Malala, son of DCP deputy party leader Cleophas Malala, has publicly declared his intention to contest for the Lurambi Constituency parliamentary seat in the 2027 General Election. Speaking...

item.title: South African Unions Must Lead the Charge to Secure Worker Protections in the Age of AI
item.description: Phakamile Hlubi-Majola warns that South Africa stands at a crossroads as artificial intelligence begins to redefine the world of work. While global forecasts from the World Economic Forum suggest that...

item.title: Hugh van Cuylenburg seeks majority stake sale in The Resilience Project wellness training business
item.description: Best-selling author, podcaster and founder of The Resilience Project, Hugh van Cuylenburg, has engaged boutique corporate advisor Canterbury Partners to sell a majority stake in his wellbeing and resi...

item.title: Global Tourism Business Association Supports DOT Secretary Dita Angara-Mathay
item.description: The Global Tourism Business Association (GTBA) has expressed its full support and readiness to collaborate with the newly appointed Secretary of the Department of Tourism (DOT), Dita Angara-Mathay. In...

item.title: US–Iran peace talks in Pakistan collapse after 21 hours without agreement
item.description: Talks between the United States and Iran in Islamabad have ended without a peace agreement after almost a full day of negotiations. The discussions, lasting 21 hours, were aimed at consolidating a fra...

item.title: Digital Payment Systems in Latin America Reach Millions, Boosting Financial Inclusion
item.description: Latin American countries are rapidly advancing in digital payments, with central banks creating instant-payment systems that are widely used by the population. Brazil's 'Pix' system, for example, is n...
